ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "biomass" REAL /* Energy produced from biomass sources (in MWh) */,
  "fossil_coal_gas" REAL /* Energy produced from fossil coal-derived gas sources (in MWh) */,
  "fossil_gas" REAL /* Energy produced from fossil gas sources (in MWh) */,
  "fossil_coal" REAL /* Energy produced from fossil hard coal sources (in MWh) */,
  "fossil_oil" REAL /* Energy produced from fossil oil sources (in MWh) */,
  "geothermal" REAL /* Energy produced from geothermal sources (in MWh) */,
  "hydro_pumped_storage" REAL /* Energy produced from hydro pumped storage (in MWh) */,
  "hydro_run_of_river" REAL /* Energy produced from hydro run-of-river sources (in MWh) */,
  "hydro_water_reservoir" REAL /* Energy produced from hydro water reservoirs (in MWh) */,
  "other" REAL /* Energy produced from other sources (in MWh) */,
  "solar" REAL /* Energy produced from solar sources (in MWh) */,
  "waste" REAL /* Energy produced from waste (in MWh) */,
  "wind_onshore" REAL /* Energy produced from wind onshore sources (in MWh) */,
  "wind_offshore" REAL /* Energy produced from wind offshore sources (in MWh) */,
  "total_production" REAL /* Total energy production (in MWh) */,
  "production_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for production */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of energy production site */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Biomass, Wind Onshore) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of energy source (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor associated with the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, engineer, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., operations, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logged data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric record */,
  "efficiency_ratio" REAL /* Efficiency ratio of energy production */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor associated with energy production */,
  "production_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the forecast record */,
  "forecasted_production" REAL /* Forecasted energy production */,
  "forecasted_consumption" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)
